title: Tarihin Putin: Daga Dan Leƙen Asiri Zuwa Shugaban ƙasa
summary: Gabatarwar tarihi mai zurfi kan Vladimir Putin da yadda ya jagoranci Rasha a fagen siyasa da rikice-rikice na duniya.
author: Amina Yusuf
content: Vladimir Putin ya kasance daya daga cikin shugabannin duniya da suka fi jan hankali a shekaru biyu da suka gabata.
A wannan bidiyon, mun bi tafiyarsa daga aikin sojan leƙen asiri zuwa matsayin shugaban ƙasa, tare da nazarin manufofi da dabarun da suka kawo masa iko.
Tarihin shine hanya mafi sauƙi don sifa matakai a yau kuma mu fahimci yadda tasirinsa ke shafar harkokin duniya.

title: Iran na amfani da makami mai hadari (Cluster Bomb)
summary: Rahoton gajeren lokaci wanda ya tabbatar da yadda Iran ke amfani da makaman cluster a wasu wurare na rikici.
author: Hafsat Bello
content: Hukumomin duniya sun tabbatar da rawar da Iran ke takawa a kawar da tsaka-tsakin da ke faruwa a yankin Gabas ta Tsakiya.
An shaida cewa an yi amfani da makaman cluster a arewacin ƙasar, wanda ya jawo suka daga hukumomin tsaron duniya.
Masu nazari na yarjejeniyar soji suna kira ga ƙasashen duniya su takaita irin wannan amfani domin kare farar hula.

title: Netanyahu na son kashe Ayatullah: Sabon rikicin siyasa
summary: Bincike kan matakan da Benjamin Netanyahu ke ɗauka a matsayin Firaministan Isra'ila da yadda yake kallon rikicin Iran.
author: Usman Abubakar
content: Firaministan Isra'ila, Benjamin Netanyahu, ya ƙara bayyana matakan da zai ɗauka idan Iran ta tayar da hargitsi a yankin.
Masu ruwa da tsaki na duniya suna neman hanyoyin sulhu domin rage tashin hankali tsakanin kasashen biyu.
Wannan labari ya ƙara hasashen cewa siyasar Gabas ta Tsakiya na neman sabbin shugabanni masu dabarun diplomasiyya.

title: Cikakken Tarihin Mahatma Gandhi da ƙoƙarin Zaman Lafiya
summary: Bash TV Media ya nuna tarihin Mahatma Gandhi tare da wasu abubuwan ganin da ba a saba gani ba.
author: Fatima Sani
content: Mahatma Gandhi ya kasance jagora wajen kawo zaman lafiya a Indiya lokacin da yake amfani da karfi na soyayya da zaman lafiya.
Bidiyon na dauke da labarai da hotuna na tarihi da ke bayyana wahalhalun da ya sha.
Masu kallo suna samun darussa na siyasa da mutunci daga wannan dogon yata.

title: Yadda Amurka ta kashe 280,000 a Hiroshima da Nagasaki a 1945
summary: Tarihin bam na nukiliya da ya kawo karshen yakin duniya na biyu amma ya bar markokin ban tsoro.
author: Bilkisu Musa
content: Bayan yaranin yakin duniya na biyu, Amurka ta tura bam na nukiliya a biranen Hiroshima da Nagasaki a Japan.
Ana ganin wannan mataki a matsayin wani bangare na karshe da ya kawo tsagaita wuta amma ya bar barna mai yawa.
Labarin yana nan a matsayin gargadi da bidiyo mai dauke da shaida daga mutanen da suka rayu.

title: Yayyida ƙungiyar ƙwallon ƙafa ta Najeriya Ta Ci Gasar
summary: Ƙungiyar Super Eagles ta nuna bajinta yayin da ta lashe gasar bajimta a shekarar nan.
author: Khalid Haruna
content: Ƙungiyar ƙwallon ƙafa ta Najeriya ta yi nasara mai ban sha'awa a gasar ƙasa da ƙasa.
Magoya baya sun yi murna bayan ƙwallon da aka ci a minti na ƙarshe.
Yan wasa sun gode wa ƙasa domin goyon bayan da suka samu.

title: Fasahar Zamani: Sabbin Yunkurin Zuba Jari a ƙasashen Afrika
summary: Manyan kamfanoni sun haɗu domin zuba jari a ƴan ƙananan kamfanonin fasaha na Afrika.
author: Zainab Adamu
content: Masu zuba jari na duniya suna koma Afrika daga baya-bayan nan saboda zirga-zirgar sabbin fasahohi.
Ana ganin hakan zai taimaka wajen samar da ayyukan yi ga matasa da kuma inganta kasuwanci.
Kananan kamfanoni sun sami karin jari domin fadada ayyukansu.

title: Sabon Shiri Na Rage Talauci A ƙasar Najeriya
summary: Gwamnatin tarayya ta sanar da sabbin matakai da za su taimaka wajen rage talauci a shekarar 2026.
author: Musa Danladi
content: Shirin zai mayar da hankali kan samar da ruwan sha, wutar lantarki da kuma ƙarin tallafin noma.
An ce za a sami haɗin guiwa tsakanin jihohi da kuma kungiyoyin kasa da kasa.
Yan siyasa sun yi kira ga al'umma da su ba da tallafi ga shirin.
